name: Waymo weekly paid rides

interpretation: Primary timing signal for GOOGL thesis. Target: 1M by end 2026.

name: NVDA Automotive revenue
signal: Quarterly earnings — growing YoY; DRIVE Orin/Thor design wins expanding
interpretation: Direct AV compute demand signal. Scales linearly with fleet deployment.

name: CCC repairable claims YoY
signal: Down 10.4% through Aug 2025 vs prior year
interpretation: Confirms frequency decline thesis. Directly supports LKQ short.

name: Average claim severity (CCC/Mitchell)
signal: Rising ~2.4x for ADAS vehicles vs non-ADAS
interpretation: Tests KS-1 kill switch. If >8% YoY for 4+ quarters, close PGR short.

name: PGR personal auto combined ratio
interpretation: Short thesis requires deterioration as frequency declines compress pricing power.

name: AEB fleet penetration (% active US fleet)
interpretation: Structural driver of frequency decline. Confirms multi-year thesis arc.

name: CPRT total-loss rate
signal: Tracking via CPRT units sold QoQ — pending Q1 2026
interpretation: Rising total-loss rate validates severity hedge thesis for CPRT long.

name: Consumer AV trust (AAA survey)
signal: Feb 2026 survey pending — prior year: 53% uncomfortable
interpretation: Delay scenario indicator. Low trust = headwind for Waymo expansion pace.
